calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-30-2003 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-30-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ingrid M. Evans, Deputy City Attorney for Defendant and Moving Party City and County of San Francisco
Steven A. Fabbro, Esq. (415) 391-6850 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Lawler
RULING:
Court discloses possible conflict. A R G U E D; DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: The Court strikes Plaintiff's general negligence cause of action as it is pre-empted by the Tort Claims Act without prejudice to Plaintiff's claims pursuant to G.C. 835(a) and (b). Summary adjudication re: the dangerous condition cause of action is DENIED. Order signed. Prevailing party is also to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
